Services / Expertise On-Demand

Senior expertise,
when you need it.

Not every engagement needs a long-term retainer. Sometimes you need a seasoned practitioner for a specific project, a second opinion on a critical decision, or short-term coverage during a transition. We make that easy.

When to use it

Flexible. Focused.
No long-term commitment.

Interim CISO Coverage

Covering a gap between permanent hires, navigating a leadership transition, or supporting a team that's temporarily under-resourced. We step in with the full weight of senior expertise, on a timeline that works for you.

Project-Based Engagements

M&A security diligence, platform evaluations, architecture reviews, or technology selection. Scoped, time-bound engagements with a clear deliverable — no ongoing commitment required.

Second Opinion & Review

A vendor is recommending a major platform change. An internal team produced a security architecture. You want someone external to pressure-test it. We bring independence and experience — without agenda.

Security Advisory Hours

Retained advisory hours for questions, reviews, and guidance — without a fixed project scope. Pull expertise as you need it, from practitioners who've operated across industries and environments.

Get started

Tell us what you need.
We'll make it work.

Talk to an Expert

Canada's pure-play cybersecurity advisory firm.
